detail.description: Jacob Gonzalez singles on a sharp ground ball to left fielder Kameron Misner. Colson Montgomery scores. Chase Meidroth to 3rd. Braden Montgomery to 2nd.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a line drive to left fielder Steven Kwan.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a line drive to right fielder Kahlil Watson.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Eli White. Miguel Vargas scores. Andrew Benintendi to 2nd.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a line drive to right fielder Eli White.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a ground ball to left fielder Riley Greene. Chase Meidroth to 2nd.
Jacob Gonzalez doubles (5) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Kahlil Watson. Nick Gonzales scores.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Chase DeLauter.
Jacob Gonzalez homers (3) on a fly ball to right field. Tyler Callihan scores.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a line drive to right fielder Chase DeLauter.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a line drive to right fielder Kahlil Watson, deflected by first baseman Kyle Manzardo.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a line drive to right fielder Austin Martin. Chase Meidroth to 3rd.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a ground ball to center fielder Byron Buxton. Miguel Vargas scores. Andrew Benintendi scores. Chase Meidroth to 3rd.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Austin Martin. Luisangel Acuña to 3rd.
Jacob Gonzalez homers (1) on a fly ball to right field.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Adolis García.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a ground ball to center fielder Colton Cowser. Tristan Peters scores. Chase Meidroth scores.
Jacob Gonzalez doubles (2) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Colton Cowser. Chase Meidroth scores.
Jacob Gonzalez singles on a ground ball to left fielder Cody Bellinger, deflected by shortstop José Caballero.
